scripts.dev: node -e "const {networkInterfaces}=require('os');console.log('');console.log('  🌐 Local:    http://localhost:3003');Object.entries(networkInterfaces()).forEach(([name,addrs])=>{if(!addrs)return;const n=name.toLowerCase();if(n.includes('vmware')||n.includes('docker')||n.includes('tailscale'))return;addrs.filter(a=>a.family==='IPv4'&&!a.internal).forEach(a=>{let label='🔌';if(n.includes('wi-fi')||n.includes('wireless'))label='📶 WiFi';else if(n.includes('ethernet'))label='🔌 Ethernet';else if(a.address.startsWith('192.168.137')||a.address.startsWith('192.168.42'))label='📱 Hotspot';console.log('  '+label+'  http://'+a.address+':3003');});});console.log('');" && next dev -p 3003 -H 0.0.0.0
